_comment: fashion_styles = clothing VIBE/MOOD (not rendering style). fashion_outfits = specific garments with fabric/color/fit details for image generation. footwear_styles = shoe types.

fashion_styles.name: elegant refined
fashion_styles.description: Polished sophisticated clothing with clean lines, luxurious fabrics like silk and cashmere, tailored fits, neutral and jewel tones. Understated confidence.

fashion_styles.name: edgy rebellious
fashion_styles.description: Bold unconventional styling with leather, ripped denim, chains, dark colors, asymmetrical cuts, hardware details. Confrontational attitude.

fashion_styles.name: casual effortless
fashion_styles.description: Relaxed everyday looks with soft cotton, denim, knits, loose comfortable fits, neutral earthy colors. Laid-back without trying too hard.

fashion_styles.name: sporty dynamic
fashion_styles.description: Athletic-inspired with performance fabrics, track jackets, sneakers, bold color blocking, streamlined silhouettes. Energy and movement.

fashion_styles.name: romantic soft
fashion_styles.description: Feminine delicate styling with lace, chiffon, ruffles, pastel colors, floral prints, soft draping, sweetheart necklines. Gentle dreamy quality.

fashion_styles.name: futuristic tech
fashion_styles.description: Avant-garde techwear with reflective materials, modular straps, neon accents, geometric cuts, metallic finishes, functional pockets. Cyberpunk adjacent.

fashion_styles.name: dark moody
fashion_styles.description: Gothic noir-inspired with black fabrics, velvet, dark jewel tones, dramatic silhouettes, lace details, Victorian influences. Mysterious intensity.

fashion_styles.name: vintage retro
fashion_styles.description: Era-specific nostalgia with authentic period details, heritage fabrics like tweed and corduroy, classic patterns, timeless silhouettes from past decades.

fashion_styles.name: minimalist clean
fashion_styles.description: Simple pared-down aesthetic with solid neutral colors, no logos, quality natural fabrics, clean silhouettes, precise tailoring. Less is more.

fashion_styles.name: maximalist bold
fashion_styles.description: Ornate statement dressing with mixed prints, bold colors, layered accessories, rich textures, dramatic proportions. More is more.

fashion_styles.name: bohemian free
fashion_styles.description: Relaxed artistic vibe with flowing fabrics, earthy tones, ethnic prints, fringe, crochet, layered jewelry, natural textures. Creative wanderer spirit.

fashion_styles.name: preppy polished
fashion_styles.description: Collegiate neat styling with polo shirts, cable-knit sweaters, blazers, chinos, loafers, heritage patterns like plaid and stripes. Clean-cut charm.

fashion_styles.name: glamorous luxe
fashion_styles.description: High-end opulent with silk, satin, fur, gold jewelry, sequins, bold makeup, figure-hugging silhouettes. Red carpet confidence.

fashion_styles.name: utilitarian rugged
fashion_styles.description: Practical workwear-inspired with durable canvas, denim, cargo pockets, boots, earth tones, functional layering. Ready for action.

fashion_styles.name: cozy comfort
fashion_styles.description: Soft warm layering with chunky knits, fleece, shearling, oversized fits, warm neutral tones, plush textures. Hygge aesthetic.

fashion_styles.name: artsy creative
fashion_styles.description: Expressive unconventional with paint splatters, deconstructed pieces, unusual color combinations, handmade accessories, gallery-opening energy.

fashion_styles.name: street smart
fashion_styles.description: Urban contemporary with hoodies, bomber jackets, cargo pants, limited sneakers, graphic elements, confident city attitude.

fashion_styles.name: sultry sensual
fashion_styles.description: Body-conscious with sheer fabrics, low necklines, high slits, form-fitting silhouettes, rich dark colors, suggestive styling.

fashion_outfits.name: silk slip dress
fashion_outfits.description: Bias-cut midi silk slip dress, delicate spaghetti straps, subtle sheen fabric that drapes fluidly over the body, cowl neckline.

fashion_outfits.name: tailored blazer and wide-leg trousers
fashion_outfits.description: Oversized double-breasted wool blazer with sharp padded shoulders, matching high-waisted wide-leg trousers with front pleats, silk camisole underneath.

fashion_outfits.name: bodycon midi dress
fashion_outfits.description: Ribbed knit bodycon midi dress with long sleeves, square neckline, fabric hugs every curve, subtle center-back slit for movement.

fashion_outfits.name: crop top and low-rise cargo pants
fashion_outfits.description: Ribbed cotton crop top with wide neckline, low-rise cargo pants with oversized pockets and adjustable ankle ties, exposed midriff, Y2K revival.

fashion_outfits.name: cashmere turtleneck and leather pencil skirt
fashion_outfits.description: Fine-knit cashmere turtleneck with relaxed fit, high-waist leather pencil skirt hitting just below the knee with center-back slit, minimalist jewelry.

fashion_outfits.name: oversized graphic hoodie and biker shorts
fashion_outfits.description: Oversized pullover hoodie with faded retro logo print, compression biker shorts, crew socks pulled up, 90s sporty casual.

fashion_outfits.name: lace corset top and satin maxi skirt
fashion_outfits.description: Intricate lace corset top with sweetheart neckline and boning, floor-length bias-cut satin maxi skirt with subtle train, romantic gothic elegance.

fashion_outfits.name: denim jacket and floral midi dress
fashion_outfits.description: Oversized denim jacket with distressed edges, flowy chiffon floral midi dress with puff sleeves, ankle boots, feminine edge.

fashion_outfits.name: cropped boucle tweed jacket and mini skirt
fashion_outfits.description: Boucle tweed cropped jacket with gold buttons and frayed trim, matching A-line mini skirt, silk camisole, Chanel-inspired ladylike elegance.

fashion_outfits.name: leather moto jacket and slip dress
fashion_outfits.description: Distressed leather moto jacket with silver zippers and snap lapels layered over a midi satin slip dress, tough-meets-delicate contrast.

fashion_outfits.name: off-shoulder knit sweater and leather pants
fashion_outfits.description: Chunky cable-knit off-shoulder slouchy sweater, high-waist skinny leather pants with ankle zips, cozy yet edgy winter look.

fashion_outfits.name: linen button-down and tailored shorts
fashion_outfits.description: Oversized linen button-down with rolled sleeves, high-waist tailored shorts with front pleats, leather belt, summer resort sophistication.

fashion_outfits.name: velvet wrap dress
fashion_outfits.description: Velvet wrap dress with true wrap closure, bishop sleeves, V-neckline, midi length, gathered waist creating hourglass silhouette, drop earrings.

fashion_outfits.name: racer jacket and parachute pants
fashion_outfits.description: Color-blocked racer jacket with sponsor patch details, nylon parachute pants with multiple straps and buckles, futuristic streetwear.

fashion_outfits.name: ruffled peasant blouse and embroidered jeans
fashion_outfits.description: Cotton off-shoulder peasant blouse with elastic neckline and tiered ruffles, high-rise straight-leg jeans with floral embroidery down the sides, bohemian spirit.

fashion_outfits.name: halter neck jumpsuit
fashion_outfits.description: Crepe halter-neck floor-length jumpsuit with deep V-neckline, wide legs that pool slightly at the heel, open back with delicate tie closure, minimalist red carpet.

fashion_outfits.name: puff-sleeve mini dress
fashion_outfits.description: Cotton poplin mini dress with dramatic puff sleeves, square neckline, fitted bodice, flared A-line skirt, cottagecore picnic energy.

fashion_outfits.name: sheer mesh top and vinyl mini skirt
fashion_outfits.description: Sheer long-sleeve mesh mock-neck top worn over a bralette, glossy vinyl A-line mini skirt with front zipper, bold club-ready styling.

fashion_outfits.name: oversized cardigan and slip maxi dress
fashion_outfits.description: Chunky oversized cardigan with no closure draping open, layered over a thin-strap satin maxi slip dress, cozy layered bohemian.

fashion_outfits.name: double-breasted trench coat dress
fashion_outfits.description: Classic gabardine double-breasted trench coat worn as a dress with belt cinched at waist, buckle, storm flaps, bare legs, timeless sophisticated.

fashion_outfits.name: tube top and low-rise wide-leg jeans
fashion_outfits.description: Ribbed strapless tube top, low-rise wide-leg jeans pooling over shoes, chunky belt with statement buckle, belly button visible, early 2000s nostalgia.

fashion_outfits.name: sequin cocktail mini dress
fashion_outfits.description: All-over sequin mini dress with long sleeves and high neckline, body-hugging fit, dazzling under light, party-ready statement piece.

fashion_outfits.name: corset bodysuit and tailored trousers
fashion_outfits.description: Satin corset-style bodysuit with lace-up back detailing, high-waist wide-leg tailored trousers, sharp crease lines, power dressing with edge.

fashion_outfits.name: plaid shirt dress with belt
fashion_outfits.description: Oversized buffalo plaid flannel shirt dress with pearl snap buttons, cinched at waist with thick leather belt, worn with sheer tights, grunge-influenced feminine.

fashion_outfits.name: cutout knit maxi dress
fashion_outfits.description: Ribbed knit floor-length bodycon dress with strategic waist cutouts, long sleeves, turtleneck, Mediterranean vacation elegance.

fashion_outfits.name: babydoll dress and platform boots
fashion_outfits.description: Chiffon babydoll dress with puffed short sleeves and empire waist, tiny bow at neckline, worn with chunky platform combat boots, playful dark femininity.

fashion_outfits.name: three-piece tailored suit
fashion_outfits.description: Wool three-piece suit with single-breasted jacket, matching waistcoat with lapels, flat-front trousers with center crease, spread-collar dress shirt, silk tie.

fashion_outfits.name: leather racer jacket and black denim
fashion_outfits.description: Vintage-inspired leather racer jacket with snap collar and side pockets, crewneck t-shirt, slim-fit selvedge denim jeans, rugged classic.

fashion_outfits.name: chunky cable-knit sweater and chinos
fashion_outfits.description: Heavy-gauge cable-knit crewneck sweater with ribbed cuffs, slim-fit chinos with rolled hem, leather belt, ivy-league autumn comfort.

fashion_outfits.name: henley and dark wash jeans
fashion_outfits.description: Long-sleeve henley with three-button placket pushed to elbows revealing forearms, slim-straight jeans, leather boots, effortless masculine.

fashion_outfits.name: double-breasted overcoat and turtleneck
fashion_outfits.description: Cashmere double-breasted full-length overcoat with peaked lapels, merino wool fine-knit turtleneck underneath, wool tailored trousers, winter refinement.

fashion_outfits.name: slim-fit polo and tailored shorts
fashion_outfits.description: Pique cotton slim-fit polo with tipped collar, tailored flat-front shorts hitting above knee, leather belt with brass buckle, resort casual.

fashion_outfits.name: flannel overshirt and white tee
fashion_outfits.description: Buffalo check flannel overshirt worn open, heavyweight cotton crewneck t-shirt underneath, slim jeans with ripped knees, rugged grunge.

fashion_outfits.name: techwear shell jacket and cargo joggers
fashion_outfits.description: Waterproof technical shell jacket with multiple zip pockets and adjustable hood, tapered cargo joggers with modular straps, futuristic utilitarian.

fashion_outfits.name: linen suit no tie
fashion_outfits.description: Lightweight linen two-button suit jacket with notch lapels and patch pockets, matching linen trousers, linen button-down shirt open at collar, no tie, relaxed summer elegance.

fashion_outfits.name: bomber jacket and grey sweats
fashion_outfits.description: Satin bomber jacket with lining and embroidered patch on chest, loopback cotton crewneck sweatshirt, slim joggers, elevated athleisure.

fashion_outfits.name: denim trucker jacket and white henley
fashion_outfits.description: Classic denim trucker jacket with copper buttons and chest pockets, waffle-knit long-sleeve henley, slim chinos, timeless Americana.

fashion_outfits.name: shawl-collar cardigan and oxford shirt
fashion_outfits.description: Chunky shawl-collar cardigan with wooden toggle buttons, oxford cloth button-down shirt underneath, corduroy trousers, scholarly warmth.

fashion_outfits.name: military field jacket and cargo pants
fashion_outfits.description: M-65 style field jacket with epaulettes and four front pockets, long-sleeve tee, cargo pants with reinforced knees, utilitarian rugged.

fashion_outfits.name: velvet dinner jacket and black trousers
fashion_outfits.description: Velvet single-button dinner jacket with satin peak lapels, crisp dress shirt with French cuffs, tuxedo trousers with satin side stripe, bow tie.

fashion_outfits.name: varsity jacket and ripped jeans
fashion_outfits.description: Wool-body leather-sleeve varsity jacket with chenille patches, t-shirt, ripped skinny jeans, high-top sneakers, retro collegiate.

fashion_outfits.name: turtleneck and wool slacks
fashion_outfits.description: Fine-gauge merino turtleneck with snug fit, wool tailored trousers with sharp crease, leather Chelsea boots, minimalist sophisticated.

fashion_outfits.name: short-sleeve camp collar shirt and drawstring trousers
fashion_outfits.description: Viscose camp collar shirt with retro geometric print, linen-blend drawstring relaxed trousers, leather sandals, vacation mode.

fashion_outfits.name: quilted vest and flannel
fashion_outfits.description: Diamond-quilted lightweight vest with corduroy collar, buffalo check flannel shirt underneath, denim jeans, leather work boots, outdoorsman layering.

fashion_outfits.name: knit polo and pleated trousers
fashion_outfits.description: Fine-knit short-sleeve knitted polo with ribbed collar and cuffs, wide-leg pleated wool trousers with high waist, leather loafers, vintage-inspired refinement.

fashion_outfits.name: traditional silk saree with gold border
fashion_outfits.description: Rich silk saree with intricate gold zari woven border, matching embroidered blouse with elbow-length sleeves, temple jewelry set, draped elegantly with pallu over shoulder.

fashion_outfits.name: modern abaya with geometric embroidery
fashion_outfits.description: Flowing crepe abaya with subtle tonal geometric embroidery on sleeves and hemline, matching hijab in lightweight chiffon, elegant contemporary modest fashion.

fashion_outfits.name: cheongsam with floral brocade
fashion_outfits.description: Fitted cheongsam with hand-embroidered golden floral brocade, mandarin collar, cap sleeves, side slits, frog button closures, classic Chinese elegance.

fashion_outfits.name: hanbok-inspired modern dress
fashion_outfits.description: Contemporary dress inspired by traditional hanbok with high empire waist, voluminous skirt with trim, long ribbon-tied jacket overlay, elegant fusion.

fashion_outfits.name: kimono-inspired wrap coat and wide trousers
fashion_outfits.description: Floor-length open-front wrap coat in shibori-dyed cotton with wide obi-style belt, linen wide-leg cropped trousers, wooden geta sandals, modern wabi-sabi aesthetic.

fashion_outfits.name: kurta pajama set
fashion_outfits.description: Raw silk knee-length kurta with delicate chikankari embroidery, slim cotton churidar pajama, matching embroidered mojari shoes, elegant traditional.

fashion_outfits.name: rich embroidered sherwani
fashion_outfits.description: Brocade floor-length sherwani with all-over gold zardozi embroidery, mandarin collar, front button placket, fitted silhouette, matching churidar, regal formal wear.

fashion_outfits.name: dashiki print shirt and trousers
fashion_outfits.description: Traditional dashiki print pullover shirt with embroidery at neckline, slim trousers, bold African heritage expression.

fashion_outfits.name: fantasy elven robe
fashion_outfits.description: Floor-length hooded robe in velvet with silver embroidered leaf patterns along hems, flowing bell sleeves, braided leather belt with crystal pendant, ethereal woodland aesthetic.

fashion_outfits.name: sci-fi jumpsuit with armor panels
fashion_outfits.description: Form-fitting technical fabric jumpsuit with hexagonal armor panels on shoulders and forearms in metallic, illuminated chest piece with soft glow, futuristic soldier.

fashion_outfits.name: steampunk adventurer ensemble
fashion_outfits.description: Leather corset-vest with brass buckles and gear embellishments over ruffled poet blouse, pinstripe jodhpurs, brass goggles pushed up on forehead, Victorian sci-fi.

fashion_outfits.name: post-apocalyptic scavenger outfit
fashion_outfits.description: Distressed leather jacket patched with different fabrics, layered tank top, cargo pants with knee pads and lots of pockets, fingerless gloves, neck gaiter, survivalist aesthetic.

fashion_outfits.name: cyberpunk hacker look
fashion_outfits.description: Translucent PVC cropped jacket with circuit-board pattern visible underneath, fitted top, techwear cargo pants with asymmetrical straps, LED-embedded accessories.

fashion_outfits.name: medieval fantasy armor dress
fashion_outfits.description: Velvet gown with structured leather corset bodice featuring brass studs and lacing, floor-length skirt with side slit revealing leather pants underneath, warrior princess aesthetic.

fashion_outfits.name: witch academia uniform
fashion_outfits.description: Wool blazer with school crest, button-down, pleated plaid skirt, striped tie in house colors, knee-high socks, wizard robes draped over shoulders, magical student.

fashion_outfits.name: space captain uniform
fashion_outfits.description: Slim-fit tunic with high mandarin collar and rank insignia on chest, matching tapered trousers with side stripe, polished boots, minimalist sci-fi authority.

fashion_outfits.name: pirate captain coat and boots
fashion_outfits.description: Brocade frock coat with wide cuffs and gold trim, ruffled shirt open at chest, leather breeches, tall folded leather boots, tricorn hat, romantic swashbuckler.
